name: C. H. ROBINSON WORLDWIDE, INC.
business: C.H. Robinson is one of the largest global logistics providers, offering freight transportation via truckload, less-than-truckload, ocean, air, and rail, along with value-added logistics services. It also provides sourcing services for fresh produce under the trade name Robinson Fresh. The company serves customers across various industries including retail, food, automotive, and technology.

exposures.sentence: C.H. Robinson Worldwide, Inc. is one of the largest global logistics providers in the world, with consolidated total revenues of $16.2 billion in 2025.
Our sourcing services consist primarily of the buying, selling, and/or marketing of fresh fruits, vegetables, and other value-added perishable items.

catalysts.sentence: On October 28, 2025, the Board of Directors approved an additional $2.0 billion of authorization under the company s share repurchase program.
We anticipate capital expenditures in 2026 to be approximately $75 million to $85 million.
